lookalikes.prompt: A male-presenting individual in their early 30s, carrying a yoga mat through a bustling city street, full-body shot. He has warm tan skin with a smooth texture. His face is heart-shaped with a slender jawline, and his dark brown, wavy hair is short and neatly styled, with a slight widow's peak. His wide-set, round eyes are dark brown, complemented by neatly trimmed, straight eyebrows. His nose is aquiline with a pointed tip, and his mouth has thin, well-defined lips. He has clean-shaven skin and a neutral, thoughtful expression, with his head held straight. His features suggest a South Asian or Latino background. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
